name: Complete Guide for Contributing to openEuler
description: Access detailed docs with step-by-step guidance on making meaningful contributions to our community.

about.name: openEuler Contribution Guide
about.description: A comprehensive guide for contributing to the openEuler open source community, covering CLA signing, issue submission, pull requests, code contribution, and community participation.

name: How to Contribute to openEuler
description: Step-by-step guide for making meaningful contributions to the openEuler open source community

step.name: Sign CLA
step.text: Sign the Contributor License Agreement (CLA) to participate in openEuler community contributions

step.name: Explore Projects
step.text: Explore openEuler projects and find areas matching your interests and skills

step.name: Submit Issues
step.text: Submit issues to report bugs, suggest features, or document problems

step.name: Submit Pull Requests
step.text: Submit pull requests with code changes, documentation improvements, or other contributions

step.name: Participate in Activities
step.text: Apply for community activities and programs to grow your open source involvement
